query: SELECT id, name, slug, description FROM atolls ORDER BY name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FFv3TtDUeNbYDM.root --database JUCCYykxYWxAcNny3wop55 --execute SELECT id, name, slug, description FROM atolls ORDER BY name;

rows.name: Alif Alif Atoll
rows.description: Kaafu Atoll is the most visited atoll in the Maldives, home to the capital Malé and numerous resort islands. It offers excellent accessibility, diverse accommodation options, and world-class diving and snorkeling.

rows.name: Alif Dhaal Atoll
rows.description: Alif Dhaal Atoll is famous for its whale shark encounters and offers a perfect blend of luxury resorts and budget-friendly local islands. The atoll is ideal for marine enthusiasts and those seeking authentic experiences.

rows.name: Baa Atoll
rows.description: Alif Alif Atoll is known for its pristine coral reefs, excellent diving conditions, and exclusive resort islands. This atoll offers a more secluded experience while maintaining accessibility from Malé.

rows.name: Dhaalu Atoll
rows.description: Quiet atoll with growing local tourism

rows.name: Faafu Atoll
rows.description: Lhaviyani Atoll is renowned for its excellent diving and snorkeling, pristine coral reefs, and luxury resort islands. The atoll offers world-class marine experiences in an exclusive setting.

rows.name: Faafu Atoll
rows.description: Less visited atoll with pristine reefs

rows.name: Gaafu Dhaalu Atoll
rows.description: Remote southern atoll with strong culture

rows.name: Meemu Atoll
rows.description: Vaavu Atoll is a hidden gem offering pristine diving conditions, exclusive resorts, and fewer crowds. The atoll is perfect for divers seeking world-class experiences in a more secluded setting.

rows.name: Vaavu Atoll
rows.description: Baa Atoll is a UNESCO Biosphere Reserve famous for Hanifaru Bay, where massive gatherings of manta rays and whale sharks occur seasonally. The atoll offers pristine marine ecosystems and exclusive resort experiences.
